title: The Real Difference Between Platform Stores and Selling Digital Products Online From Countries Blocked by Payment Platforms
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip do not work in your country. That is a platform problem, not a you problem. Here is what actually works.

content.text: Having a great digital product to sell is only half the battle, especially when you're from a country like Nigeria or Iran, where payment platforms like PayPal and Stripe are restricted, leaving you wondering how to collect payments from customers, it's frustrating to have a product and be blocked from collecting payment, this is a common problem for many creators who sell ebooks, courses, and software, and are looking for a reliable alternative to traditional payment platforms
What You Are Actually Comparing

When you're comparing different options for selling digital products online, you need to consider the underlying infrastructure and how it affects your ability to collect payments, traditional platforms like Gumroad and Payhip rely on PayPal and Stripe, which have strict geographic restrictions, so if you're from a blocked country, you're out of luck, on the other hand, crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce offers a more flexible and global solution
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

The traditional platforms break down when it comes to creators from restricted countries, who are often forced to rely on middlemen or other workarounds just to get paid, this not only eats into their profits but also creates unnecessary complexity and risk, furthermore, these platforms often have strict KYC requirements, which can be difficult to navigate, especially for solo creators or small businesses
What Crypto-Native Infrastructure Does Differently

Crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, offers a more streamlined and global solution, with no geographic restrictions or KYC requirements, this means that creators from anywhere in the world can sell their digital products and get paid instantly, without having to rely on middlemen or workarounds, Unchained Commerce, for example, uses NOWPayments, which supports over 300 coins and offers instant automated delivery
Creators from restricted countries are being held back by traditional payment platforms, which are failing to meet their needs
The Real Cost Difference

When you factor in the costs of using traditional platforms, including the fees and commissions, it can be expensive, especially for creators who are just starting out, crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, offers a more cost-effective solution, with one-time payments and no subscriptions, this means that creators can keep more of their profits and focus on growing their business
Which One to Use and Why

So, which one should you use, if you're a creator from a restricted country, the answer is clear, crypto-native infrastructure offers a more flexible, global, and cost-effective solution, with Unchained Commerce, you can set up a fully automated store with the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, and start selling your digital products to customers all over the world
What Creators in Restricted Countries Are Asking

If you're a creator from Nigeria or Iran, you can sell digital products without PayPal by using a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce, which offers a more flexible and global solution, you can also use the Web3 Wallet Connect to integrate with multiple blockchains and get paid in your preferred cryptocurrency, and with the Admin Dashboard, you can track your sales and analytics in real-time, this means that you can focus on creating great products and growing your business, without worrying about how to get paid
Crypto-native infrastructure offers a more flexible and global solution, with no geographic restrictions or KYC requirements
Related Topics Worth Reading

For creators who are looking for alternatives to Gumroad and Payhip, or who want to sell online without a Stripe account, crypto-native infrastructure offers a more reliable and flexible solution, with Unchained Commerce, you can set up a fully automated store and start selling your digital products to customers all over the world, without worrying about geographic restrictions or KYC requirements
Your Launch Checklist — No Platform Permission Required

Before you launch your store, make sure you have a clear understanding of your target market and the products you want to sell, then, set up your Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect, and configure your Admin Dashboard to track your sales and analytics, you should also test your payment flows and ensure that everything is working smoothly, with Unchained Commerce, you can get priority updates and Discord support, as well as a deployment guide to help you get started, this means that you can focus on creating great products and growing your business, without worrying about the technical details
With a fully automated store and instant automated delivery, you can focus on creating great products and growing your business, without worrying about how to get paid
